spec_match.rationale: The page exercises the exact feature surface or its documented replacement/fallback rather than an unrelated baseline API.

interactive.rationale: The concept exposes real controls and updates rendered output or API state.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept is a distinct use case under the ChromeStatus listing summary.

edge_cases.rationale: Unsupported and constrained states are surfaced honestly.

conformance.rationale: The v152 feature-level suite encodes the matching spec contract and was created without editing any existing suite.

runtime_evidence.rationale: Fresh Chrome DevTools MCP control sweep passed after final edits, and full-page desktop plus representative mobile screenshots were inspected for clipping, overflow, contrast, and fallback geometry.

design_system.rationale: The page uses the shared showcase shell and design-system variables with readable code/status surfaces.

accessibility.rationale: The fresh sweep found all detected controls programmatically named; controls use native semantics and changing output is exposed as text/live status.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP exercised the v152 manifest-builder controls with clean post-triage runtime results. Desktop and mobile visual evidence was inspected.
